Package org.eventb.internal.pp.loader.clause

Class ClauseBuilder

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.pp.loader.clause.ClauseBuilder
public final class ClauseBuilder extends Object
This is the builder for the second phase of the loading process. The input is the IContext filled in by the first part of the loading process. At the end of this phase, no simplifications have been applied.
